# bankruptcymill.org

> What is a bankruptcy mill? Educational resource about high-volume law firms with poor client outcomes.

This site is part of the Bankruptcy Transparency Network -- free, open-source bankruptcy information based on national federal court data covering 4.9 million cases across 94 districts.

## Related Sites
- https://1328f.com -- Free bankruptcy discharge screener
- https://1328f.org -- Research platform and empirical data
- https://serialfiler.org -- Serial filing restrictions
- https://dischargebar.org -- Discharge waiting periods
- https://whatischapter7.com -- Chapter 7 guide
- https://chapter13plan.org -- Chapter 13 plan guide

## Contact
- Ko-fi: https://ko-fi.com/ilikemath9999
